raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija Elijaſ uß to:
Paleez jelle ſcheitan/ jo tas
KUNGS irr mann pee Jarda-
nas fuhtijs/ bet tas ẜazzija: Tik
teescham ka tas KUNGS dsih-
wo/ un taiva Dwehfele dsihwo/
es tew ne atſtahtchu. Ta gabje
tee abbi diwi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un peezdesmits Wihrî no
to Praweeschn Behrneem/gabje
un stahweja itt pretti no tahte-
nes/ un tee diwi stahweja pee
Jardanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Elijas fatwu
Mehteli/ un fatinne to/ un fitte
to Uhdeni/ un tas dallijahs ab-
bejâs Puſſês/ ka tee diwi sau-
fahm Kahjahm zaur gabje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tee nu bij zaur gahju-
tchi/ tad ẜazzija Elijas us Elisu:
Luhdsî / fo man tew buhs dar-
riht/ pirmis es no tewim tohpu
atnemts. Un Elisus ẜazzija: Laid
jelle taws Gars diwejada Meh-
râ us man irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch ẜazzija: Tu ef-
si weenu gruhtu Leetu luhdsis/
ja tu mann redsefi/ kad es no
tewim tapſchu atnemts/ tad tas
tew ta notiks / bet ja ue/ tad tas
arri ne notiks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tee nu gabje/un run-
naja/raugi/ tad nahze uggunigi
Ratti/ un nggunigi Sirgi/ kas
tohs diwi atſchkihre/ ta brauze
Elijas ar Wehtru us Debbeſim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Elsis redseja to/ un
brehze: Mans Tehws / nians
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch pazehle arridsan
Elijaſa Mehteli / kas winnam
bija nokrittis/ un greesehs atpak-
kat / un stahweja Jardanas
Malla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nehme to Meh-
teli no Elijata/ kas tam bija no-
krittis/ un fitte to Uhdeni/ un ẜaz-
zija: Kur irr tas KUNGS Eli-
jafa Deews? ja tas pats ? un
wiꞥſch fitte to Uhdeni/ un tas
dallijahs abbejâs Puſſês/ un E-
lisus gabje zauri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu to Praweeschn
Behrni Jerikunâ / kas tur pretti
bij stahweifschi / winnu redseja /
tad ẜazzija tee : Elijaſa Gars duſſ
us Elisu / un tee gabje winnam
pretti / un klannijahs preekſch
winnu pee Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ẜazzija us winnu :
Rangi/ luhdsams/ starp taweem
Kalpeem irr peezdesmits stipri
Wihrî/ lai jelle tee eet/ un tawu
Rungu metke; Jaschu ta KUN-
GA Gars irr winnu rehmis /
un us kahdu Kalnu jeb kahda
Eeleijâ mettis. Bet wiꞥſch ẜaz-
zija: Ne tuhtajt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee luhdse wehl wat-
rak/ kamehr winnam Rauns bi-
ja/ un wiꞥſch ẜazzija: Suhtajt.
Un tee fuhtijs peezdesmits Wihr-
rus/ un mekleja to trihs Dee-
nas/ un ne atradde to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
